summary: Added top-level `shape --robot-triage`, `shape capabilities --json`, and `shape robot-docs guide` surfaces backed by existing read-only doctor data.
Changed `shape doctor --fix` from a generic clap unknown-flag error into an explicit safe refusal with exact read-only alternatives.
Updated `operator.json` and `--describe` expectations to advertise top-level agent surfaces, version 0.7.0, and profile-aware capability metadata.
Allowed top-level `--json` to control doctor health output so `shape --json doctor health` returns a machine-readable report.
